case_title: WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC VS. RONALD TODD BLEVINS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BLEVINS, RONALD TODD $251,313.05 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $251,763.05, SEE SCANNED DOC

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: appearances: steven b. mains, esq., mains + bloom pc, 415.459.1847, for petitioner wells fargo advisors, llc; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: Granted IN THE AMOUNT OF $251,313.05 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $450.00. PETITIONER MAY FILE A POST-JUDGMENT MOTION FOR FEES PER CODE AND CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT. No opposition filed. Order AND JUDGMENT signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported
